content: Multiple residents reported a phishing SMS pretending to be from City Utility Billing. Link asks for card re-verification.
Scheduled maintenance caused a power outage in North Block sectors 4 and 5. Service expected to return by 11:30 AM.
Everything is broken in this city, nobody cares anymore.
Confirmed scam call campaign: callers claim to be police and ask for immediate payment through gift cards.
confirmed scam call campaign callers claim to be police and ask for immediate payment through gift cards
Anyone else seeing weird login alerts for neighborhood community portal accounts?
Neighborhood community portal experienced repeated failed login spikes. Users advised to reset passwords.
Internet outage reported across East Park due to fiber cut. Providers estimate restoration in 2 hours.
Internet down in East Park, no service since morning after road digging near signal junction.
Urgent: fake donation websites are impersonating flood relief groups and collecting card details.
Local hospital reported a ransomware attack, all systems temporarily offline.
Traffic is horrible on Main Street, avoid if possible.
There is traffic jam at Main Street
